body:
[package]
name = "tree-sitter-verse"
version = "0.1.11"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT"
description = "Tree-sitter grammar for Epic Games Verse (UEFN)"
repository = "https://github.com/taku25/tree-sitter-verse"

[dependencies]
tree-sitter = { workspace = true }
tree-sitter-language = { workspace = true }

[build-dependencies]
cc = "1"
